title: Aurora
description: Resource pack adds Aurora Borealis to game.
body:
⚠️𝗡𝗼𝘁𝗲: 𝗥𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗿𝗲𝘀 𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗻𝗲

![](https://files.catbox.moe/lpbkvk.png)


🌌 **Aurora Borealis – Green Skies at Night**

This resource pack adds a realistic green aurora borealis to the night sky, giving your world that shader-like glow — without using any actual shaders 💚

✨ Purely resource pack-based (~~no shaders required~~)

✨ Replaces sky textures with custom aurora skies

✨ Light on performance, heavy on vibes


Level up your night skies with that arctic dream glow ❄️✨

Huge Thanks ✨ to [Ray_Savage](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/stingray-s-aurora-borealis-custom-sky/) for making the resource packs for you.

  ――――――――――――――Loved the texture pack? Check out more [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Orenxo)――――――――――――――

➙Join our discord server for fun community and get updates.
